## Type

## Checklist
- [ ] Focused on one logical change
- [ ] No public API / package / event names renamed
- [ ] Tests added or updated where sensible
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commits signed off (`git commit -s`)
